components.value: V, S, M (a few drops of liquor)

description.value: This spell makes the ammunition in the target firearm is prone to misfire. Increase the misfire range by 1 + 1 per five caster levels (maximum +5) for the ammunition currently loaded into that firearm. If aware of this spellâs effect prior to firing the altered ammunition (a DC 17 Spellcraft check to identify the spell being cast or similar effect), the firearmâs user can spend a standard action to clear the altered ammunition from the firearm.
